overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a historical action game depicting an 18th-century protagonist walking through revolutionary Paris. The character moves from a palace courtyard through barricaded streets and into a crowded revolutionary square, with dense crowds, debris, and classical European architecture rendered in high-fidelity game engine graphics.

segments.scene_description: The protagonist walks through a wide palace courtyard with scattered debris and moderate crowds. Large decorative urns and ornate street lamps line the path toward a massive classical stone building in the distance, while civilians run past in various directions.

events.description: camera tilts upward to reveal the full height of the palace facade
character turns right to walk along the building side

agents.ego_description: approaching the palace entrance, looking up at the architecture, then turning to follow the building perimeter

notable_agents.action: guards standing at attention near the palace entrance

entered.detail: grand arched doorway with columns and decorative stonework
tall stone columns flanking the main entrance

segments.scene_description: The protagonist approaches the palace entrance where guards stand watch, then tilts the camera up to admire the building's height before turning right to walk along the stone facade. The courtyard elements fade behind as the massive stone walls dominate the view.

events.description: exiting the narrow building side into the open revolutionary square

agents.ego_description: walking along the palace wall, passing wooden barricades and an overturned cart

segments.scene_description: Moving along the narrow side of the palace, the protagonist passes revolutionary barricades and an overturned cart in a sparsely populated alley. The street opens ahead toward a distant square while the palace wall remains on the right.

agents.ego_description: navigating through the dense revolutionary crowd gathered in the square

irregular cobblestone paving covering the public square

segments.scene_description: The protagonist enters a wide cobblestone square filled with a dense revolutionary crowd gathered around a central fountain. Tricolor flags wave from surrounding classical buildings as smoke hangs in the air, and the character navigates through the packed gathering.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the orderly grandeur of a palace courtyard into the chaotic heart of a revolutionary square. It begins by tracking the protagonist through a wide courtyard filled with scattered debris and civilians running past ornate street lamps and decorative urns. As the camera approaches the palace entrance, it tilts upward to capture the scale of the massive stone building before turning right to follow the imposing facade. The scene then shifts into a narrower alleyway, passing overturned carts and revolutionary barricades that lead away from the palace walls. Finally, the path opens into a wide cobblestone square where the camera navigates through a dense, smoke-filled crowd gathered around a central fountain beneath waving tricolor flags.
